name: security-audit
description: Security suite for Claude Code: pre-install dependency audits (npm/NuGet/pub.dev/PyPI/cargo/go/Docker/MCP/plugins/binaries) plus secrets scanning (API keys, tokens, private keys, connection strings) and hook auditing (malicious .claude/settings.json patterns). Catches typosquats, fresh malware drops, maintainer takeovers, hardcoded credentials, and exfiltration hooks before they reach production.
